reasoning.research_depth: Strong technical analysis with data-driven approach. Uses calculations, graphs, and engineering principles to explain automotive topics.
reasoning.signal_noise: Excellent signal-to-noise ratio with focused explanations. Whiteboard format keeps content dense and educational.
reasoning.originality: Solid engineering education format. The whiteboard approach is distinctive but the automotive focus is well-covered territory.
reasoning.lasting_impact: Good evergreen content for engineering principles. Fundamental physics and engineering concepts remain relevant regardless of specific car models discussed.
